title: Structural Intelligence: Foundations, Frontiers, and Future Directions
description: Structural Intelligence (SI) is a unified research program investigating intelligence from the perspectives of structures, decisions, trajectories, and collective intelligence. The framework introduces the Structural Intelligence Foundation Stack (SIFS), three major frontier directions (CGCCC, PDS/ASI, and FTI), and a set of future research directions including Metric Canonicalization, Evidence Intelligence, Simulation Intelligence, and Collective Intelligence. This repository serves as a top-level research map connecting a broader family of Structural Intelligence projects.
